description: Capacitor WebView mobile/을 Kotlin Compose 네이티브 CBT 앱으로 전환하고, 완전 오프라인과 Play Billing에 필요한 최소 백엔드 계약을 추가한다.

steps.name: backend-mobile-contracts
steps.description: 모바일 스냅샷 API와 오프라인 제출 중복 방지 계약 추가
steps.summary: POST /api/solves optional clientSubmissionId + solve.client_submission_id/Flyway V88 + idempotent reuse, GET /api/mobile/content/snapshot ETag endpoint with premium filtering. compileJava, SolveServiceTest, SolveControllerTest, and full backend test passed.

steps.name: android-compose-app
steps.description: mobile/을 Kotlin Compose Android 앱 프로젝트로 전환
steps.summary: Removed tracked Capacitor files and added Kotlin Compose Android project with package com.sqldpass.app, 문어CBT app label, reused logo, Retrofit/Moshi/Room/token store/offline queue/Google auth/Play Billing integration points, and tab-based CBT UI.

steps.name: validation-and-handoff
steps.description: 검증 명령 실행, Android SDK 제약 기록, phase 상태 정리
steps.summary: Installed Android Studio plus Android SDK command-line tools/platform android-35/build-tools/platform-tools, configured mobile/local.properties, fixed Java/Kotlin target alignment, and verified mobile :app:assembleDebug plus backend .\gradlew.bat test.
